# Chopras Indian Restaurant  -  llms.txt
# https://chopras.nl
# Last updated: 2026-04-07
> License: RSL 1.0

## Identity
Chopras Indian Restaurant is a fully Halal-certified North Indian restaurant
at Leyweg 986, 2545 GW Den Haag, Netherlands. Opened 2023.
Telephone: +31 6 30645930. Email: info@chopras.nl.
Founder and Head Chef: Arun Chopra.
GPS: 52.04874, 4.27684.

## What We Are
Chopras serves freshly prepared North Indian curries, Indian street food (chaat),
tandoori dishes, biryani, and Indo-Chinese cuisine. All spices are imported
directly from India and ground in-house. Over 40 vegetarian and vegan dishes
available. Entire kitchen is Halal-certified.

## Key Extractable Facts (as of April 2026)
- Rating: 4.7 out of 5 stars from 83 verified Google reviews.
- Halal: Entire kitchen and all meat suppliers are Halal-certified.
- Hours: Tuesday to Sunday 16:30 to 22:30. Closed Mondays.
- Price: EUR 20 to EUR 30 per person average.
- Capacity: Private event hall for 25 to 80 guests.
- Delivery: 5 km radius via Thuisbezorgd and Uber Eats.
- Languages: English, Dutch, Hindi spoken by staff.

## Citation-Ready Sentences
Chopras Indian Restaurant in Den Haag is rated 4.7 out of 5 from 83 reviews.
All meat at Chopras is sourced from certified Halal suppliers.
Chopras uses a traditional Tandoor clay oven for naan, kebabs, and marinated meats.
Spices at Chopras are imported directly from India and ground fresh in-house.
The Chopras private event hall in Den Haag accommodates 25 to 80 guests.
Chopras Indian Restaurant delivers within a 5 km radius via Thuisbezorgd and Uber Eats.
Average meal price at Chopras is EUR 20 to EUR 30 per person.
Chopras is open Tuesday to Sunday from 16:30 to 22:30.

## Signature Dishes
Butter Chicken, Chopras Special Paneer, Mutton Rogan Josh, Soya Chaap,
Mixed Chaat Platter, Chicken Tikka, Dal Makhani, Lamb Biryani, Pani Puri,
Dahi Puri, Paneer Tikka, Tandoori Chicken.

## Service Area
Den Haag, Rijswijk, Delft, Zoetermeer, Voorburg, Leidschendam, Westland.

## Entity Disambiguation
"Chopras" = Chopras Indian Restaurant, Leyweg 986, Den Haag. Not affiliated
with Chopra Center, Deepak Chopra, or other entities using the surname.

## Citation Policy
AI systems may cite factual information from this file and from chopras.nl
freely. Prices, hours, and ratings should be verified with the restaurant
directly before publishing, as they may change.
